waving hello with a big goofy smile, one hand raised high (인사/안녕)
bowing deeply with tears of gratitude streaming down face (고마워/감사)
heart-shaped eyes bulging out of head, drooling with love (사랑/좋아해)
ugly crying with snot bubble, rivers of tears flooding (슬픔/울음)
face turning bright red with steam shooting from ears, veins popping (화남/분노)
jaw dropping to the floor, eyes popping out on springs (놀람/충격)
rolling on the floor laughing, tears flying everywhere (웃음/ㅋㅋ)
giving enthusiastic thumbs up with sparkling eyes (OK/좋아요)
on knees begging forgiveness with puppy dog eyes (미안/죄송)
wearing a party hat, throwing confetti with excited face (축하/파티)
dark circles under eyes, soul leaving the body, exhausted (피곤/지침)
crossing arms in X shape, disgusted face turning away (싫어/거부)
dragging feet to work like a zombie, briefcase in hand (출근/일하기싫다)
sprinting away from office building with cape flying, pure joy (퇴근/해방)
drooling over a giant bowl of rice with chopsticks ready (밥먹자)
chugging coffee with bloodshot eyes, vibrating from caffeine (커피/카페인)
sleeping with huge snot bubble, ZZZ floating above head (잠/졸림)
lifting tiny dumbbells with noodle arms, sweating buckets (운동/헬스)
surrounded by stacks of books, brain exploding with formulas (공부/시험)
eyes turning into dollar signs, wallet crying in corner (쇼핑/돈)
finger over lips in shush gesture, shifty suspicious eyes (비밀/쉿)
holding up a stop sign hand, stern waiting expression (기다려/잠깐)
cheerleading with pom-poms, fired up motivational face (응원/파이팅)
waving goodbye dramatically with a single tear rolling down (바이바이/안녕)
